# AI Marketplace

> A personal marketplace of AI-oriented plugins for Claude Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI. Install reusable skills, hooks, and MCP servers by name.

This marketplace works with both Claude Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI, and its skills are invokable from each agent's CLI and Desktop app. Add the marketplace once with `copilot plugin marketplace add https://github.com/urikanonov/ai-marketplace` (or `claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/urikanonov/ai-marketplace`), then install a plugin with `copilot plugin install <name>@urikan-ai-marketplace`; a Claude-installable plugin also supports `claude plugin install <name>@urikan-ai-marketplace` (per-plugin support is noted below).

## Plugins
- [commentable-html](https://urikanonov.github.io/ai-marketplace/commentable-html/) (Claude Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI): Make any static HTML report reviewable. Readers highlight any paragraph, table cell, code block, KQL query, chart, image, or diagram, leave inline comments, and export the whole thread back to your agent to act on - all in one portable file, no server or build required.
- [multi-duck](https://urikanonov.github.io/ai-marketplace/multi-duck/) (Claude Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI): Convene a panel of independent rubber-duck reviewers over your in-flight work (a diff, PR, plan, tests, or commentable HTML plans with their open comments), each on a different model so their blind spots do not overlap, all in parallel, then consolidate the findings and autonomously apply the safe fixes. Two modes: prisms for wide coverage, consensus for cross-model agreement. Works on Claude Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI.
- [urikan-ai-marketplace-auto-updater](https://urikanonov.github.io/ai-marketplace/urikan-ai-marketplace-auto-updater/) (Claude Code and the GitHub Copilot CLI): Automatically checks for and installs plugin updates from the urikan-ai-marketplace on session start. Opt-in: only install if you want automatic updates.

## Documentation
- [Commentable HTML tutorial](https://urikanonov.github.io/ai-marketplace/commentable-html/tutorial/)
